name: Chinese Document Formatter
description_en: A Chinese Word document formatting toolkit for .docx/.doc/.wps: diagnose formatting issues, fix mixed Chinese/English punctuation and spacing, apply official/academic/legal presets, normalize tables and page numbers, preserve revision marks, and convert plain text or Markdown into formatted DOCX.
description_zh: 面向 .docx/.doc/.wps 的中文 Word 文档排版工具箱:诊断排版问题、修正中英文标点与空格、套用公文/学术/法律预设、规范表格与页码、保留修订标记,并把纯文本或 Markdown 转成已排版的 DOCX。
long_en: Runs command-line scripts that mirror a desktop formatter's pipeline, suited to batch cleanup of Chinese official documents without a GUI.
long_zh: 通过命令行脚本复刻桌面排版工具的核心流程,适合无 GUI 地批量清理中文公文。
sec_note_en: Runs local Python scripts that rewrite your Word documents in place; back up before batch cleanup.
sec_note_zh: 运行本地 Python 脚本就地改写你的 Word 文档;批量清理前请先备份。
